radar_entity.name: SPACEX-STARLINK
radar_entity.scope: public ASN-level aggregate observations, not satellite internal telemetry

calibration_mapping.mobile_desktop_and_geography: regions[] distribute demand across constellation planes and slots.
calibration_mapping.bot_human_api: time_series share fields drive human-web, API, automated and DNS/control task classes.
calibration_mapping.content_type_distribution: traffic_classes include video, interactive, background sync, web, API, DNS and automated traffic.
calibration_mapping.quality_and_outages: quality_model and anomalies[] create latency-sensitive windows, slowdown windows, burst windows and reduced-delivery pressure.
calibration_mapping.routing_context: backbone_flows create persistent cross-region traffic resembling public ASN transit/egress pressure.

quality_model.notes: Cloudflare AS14593 quality pages expose bandwidth, latency, DNS response time and jitter dimensions. This profile maps those dimensions into traffic class priorities and anomaly windows rather than claiming raw speed-test traces.

source_references.name: Cloudflare Radar overview
source_references.used_for: Global Internet traffic, DNS, technology trend, and anonymized aggregate data source context.

source_references.name: Cloudflare Radar AS14593 overview
source_references.used_for: Starlink public ASN identity, traffic trend categories, protocol adoption, HTTP request distribution, DNS and routing context.

source_references.name: Cloudflare Radar AS14593 traffic
source_references.used_for: Starlink-scoped traffic volume, HTTP traffic, mobile/desktop, bot/human, content type, API traffic, outages, anomalies, and geographic distribution dimensions.

source_references.name: Cloudflare Radar AS14593 quality
source_references.used_for: Starlink-scoped bandwidth, latency, DNS response time, jitter and aggregated speed-test quality context.

source_references.name: Cloudflare Radar AS14593 routing
source_references.used_for: Starlink ASN routing statistics, announced address space, BGP announcements and connectivity context.

source_references.name: Cloudflare Radar NetFlows
source_references.used_for: Network traffic trend context across Cloudflare edge routers.

source_references.name: Cloudflare Radar traffic dashboard
source_references.used_for: HTTP request class, content/API traffic, bot/human traffic, and traffic mix concepts.
